testcase.name: test_website_settings_includes_documents_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing field: nav_documents_label assert 'nav_documents_label' in {'accent_color': '', 'admin_page_badge': '', 'admin_page_subtitle': '', 'admin_page_title': '', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter134_admin_settings_tabs.py:229: in test_website_settings_includes_documents_fields assert field in settings, f"Missing field: {field}" E AssertionError: Missing field: nav_documents_label E assert 'nav_documents_label' in {'accent_color': '', 'admin_page_badge': '', 'admin_page_subtitle': '', 'admin_page_title': '', ...}

testcase.name: test_documents_settings_saved_and_retrievable

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'TEST_Saved Title 134' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd6a4fc2d380>('documents_page_title') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd6a4fc2d380> = {'accent_color': '', 'admin_page_badge': '', 'admin_page_subtitle': '', 'admin_page_title': '', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter134_admin_settings_tabs.py:256: in test_documents_settings_saved_and_retrievable assert settings.get("documents_page_title") == "TEST_Saved Title 134" E AssertionError: assert None == 'TEST_Saved Title 134' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd6a4fc2d380>('documents_page_title') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfd6a4fc2d380> = {'accent_color': '', 'admin_page_badge': '', 'admin_page_subtitle': '', 'admin_page_title': '', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_public_website_settings_includes_documents_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: nav_documents_label missing from public settings assert 'nav_documents_label' in {'accent_color': '', 'admin_page_badge': '', 'admin_page_subtitle': '', 'admin_page_title': '', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter134_admin_settings_tabs.py:270: in test_public_website_settings_includes_documents_fields assert "nav_documents_label" in settings, "nav_documents_label missing from public settings" E AssertionError: nav_documents_label missing from public settings E assert 'nav_documents_label' in {'accent_color': '', 'admin_page_badge': '', 'admin_page_subtitle': '', 'admin_page_title': '', ...}
